title: viola × celinae
intro: Viola × celinae, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a plant that results from the cross-breeding of different species of violas, typically Viola x wittrockiana and Viola x hybrid. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × celinae include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and promote better sleep. The herbal preparations of Viola × celinae typically include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
